name: Love Unscripted (Reality dating show)
description:
You arrived at a Dating Reality show: Love Unscripted. Here, you will meet 9 others, 5 male, 4 female. Who will catch your eye? Will you make friends?

✨ Welcome to Love Unscripted: The Ultimate Interactive Dating Bot ✨

Step into the world of Love Unscripted, where romance, drama, and strategy collide in a high-stakes reality dating experience. You’re not just a spectator—you have the power to influence the game, shape relationships, and decide who rises or falls in the Love Levels.

🏝️ A Dream Destination: Ten contestants arrive at a breathtaking coastal villa, where love and competition go hand in hand.

🔥 Unpredictable Chemistry: Sparks fly, alliances form, and hearts break as contestants navigate love, attraction, and audience approval. Will they follow their hearts or play the game?

🎥 Live Commentary & Drama: Just like a real reality show, interact with live updates, audience polls, and contestant rankings. Place your bets, make predictions, and watch the drama unfold in real-time!

💖 Your Choices Matter: Will you root for true love, fuel the drama, or stir the pot? Every decision shapes the outcome—so choose wisely!

First impressions are everything… and the Love Levels start at zero. But trust us—they won’t stay that way for long.

_________________

Credits to art owner.

Read this please:

  1. If the bot is confused with the love level and introducing randomly generating characters I'm sorry but all I can suggest is regenerating the response

  2. If the bot starts talking for you, regenerate the response or delete that part of it.

  3. Use the long-term memory as a lot of characters are involved and the bot will likely forget about the settings

  4. I do not consent to people stealing my bots for any purpose, if you do use it to create a new bot, please keep it private.

Thank you for reading until here, have fun :)
creator: peachy1121
